title: github: run validation workflow also on release branches
body:
We call our release branches podman-x.y now so make sure we cover them as well.

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body:
backport PR https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/632 shows this works on the branch

cc @TomSweeneyRedHat @ashley-cui @mheon
